title: Start Date + End Date = Timeline Automation

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
New recipe unlocked in the CarbonToolbelt’s Date Change Automations!

Hello my fellow monday mavens!

I know you’re tired of having to manually adjust your timelines to match start and end dates. And we were too, so we added it to our toolbelt! Check out our solution, plus dozens of other dynamic custom automations to improve your workflow.

Automation Recipe

When column changes, update timeline with start date and end date


This simple recipe will ensure your timeline column is always in sync with your date columns. Just make sure you set it up twice, once for each date column so any date changes are reflected on the timeline!

Try out the CarbonToolbelt with a free tier!

Can’t find the solutions you need? Send your requests to support@carbonweb.co and we can build them!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing this, Carson! Super exciting!
